channel.title: redis on Akynazh
channel.description: Recent content in redis on Akynazh

item.title: Redis学习记录（一）
item.description: Redis学习记录（一） Author: akynazh 个人网站: akynazh Open, Connect And Config open redis: redis-server connect to redis: redis-cli disconnect: redis-cli shutdown show chinese: redis-cli --raw connect to remote redis: redis-cli -h host -p port -a password get redis config: config get {config_name} Data Type list: lpush clist redis lpush clist mysql lrange clist 0 100 key: 127.0.0.1:6379>
